---
title: "Main Experiment"
---

## What — Experiment Identity

- **Experiment**: compare the full proposed method against all baselines on the held-out test set

## Why — Experiment Purpose

- **Claim addressed**: Claim 1 — the full model outperforms [best baseline] by ≥ [δ] on [metric]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-main-design
//| fig-cap: "Main experiment: metrics measure baseline-vs-proposed gap to confirm Claim 1"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.2
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    BL [label="Baselines",  fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    Our [label="Proposed",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    MA [label="Metric A"]
    MB [label="Metric B"]
    MC [label="Metric C"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Claim [label="Claim 1 Confirmed", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }

  BL  -> MA  BL  -> MB  BL  -> MC
  Our -> MA  Our -> MB  Our -> MC
  MA  -> Claim  MB -> Claim  MC -> Claim
}
```

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Datasets</strong></summary>

- **Dataset**: [name, version]
- **Split**: [N_train / N_val / N_test] samples
- **Preprocessing**: [standardisation, missing-value handling, class-imbalance strategy]

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Baselines</strong></summary>

| Baseline | Description | Reference |
|----------|-------------|-----------|
| Linear | Logistic regression | scikit-learn |
| MLP-vanilla | MLP without key components | this repo |
| [SotA method] | [description] | [citation] |

- All baselines trained with identical optimiser, lr, and seed

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Evaluation Metrics</strong></summary>

| Metric | What it measures | Why chosen |
|--------|-----------------|------------|
| [Metric A] | [e.g., overall accuracy] | [primary claim metric] |
| [Metric B] | [e.g., macro F1] | [handles class imbalance] |
| [Metric C] | [e.g., ECE calibration] | [measures prediction confidence] |

- Statistical test: [test name], p < 0.05 vs. best baseline
- Effect size: Cohen's d = [value] / Δ = [absolute improvement]

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Run Commands</strong></summary>

```bash
# Train proposed method
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method>

# Train each baseline
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=linear
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=mlp_vanilla

# MLflow run logged to: mlruns/
```

</details>

---

## Results

> Fill in after running the experiment. Report mean ± std across [K] random seeds.

| Method | Metric A | Metric B | Metric C |
|--------|----------|----------|----------|
| Linear baseline | — | — | — |
| MLP-vanilla | — | — | — |
| [SotA method] | — | — | — |
| **Proposed (ours)** | **—** | **—** | **—** |

---

## Analysis

<details>
<summary><strong>Error Analysis</strong></summary>

- **Confusion matrix**: large off-diagonal entries indicate [class-pair confusion] — [explanation]
- **Per-class performance**: [class with lowest recall] suffers from [hypothesised reason]
- **Calibration**: reliability diagram shows [over/under-confident in what range]

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>Claim Status</strong></summary>

- **Claim 1 status**: ⬜ Pending — will be updated after runs complete
- **Key finding**: [placeholder — state the main insight]

</details>
